entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Déan díospóireacht ar uaillmhian le Steve Jobs"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Déan díospóireacht ar bheartas aeráide le Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Déan díospóireacht ar cheartas le Batman"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Debate with a personality a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim argóna, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argóint

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Roghnaigh pearsantacht.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Déan díospóireacht le pearsantacht

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Déan Díospóireacht le Pearsantacht ag Úsáid IS chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: ainmnigh pearsantacht fhíor nó fhicseanúil agus déan díospóireacht léi ar aon ábhar. Déanann an IS a stíl phoiblí agus a radharc domhanda a chainéalú agus an díospóireacht a choinneáil cothrom.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Déan Díospóireacht le Pearsantacht ag Úsáid IS: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh cleachtadh díospóireachta bríomhar le guthanna cuimhneacha agus dúshlán cothrom.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Cleacht frithfhreagraí.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Socraigh ábhar.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Debate with a personality. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Debate any topic. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Úsáideann an díospóireacht stíl phoiblí agus dearcadh domhanda gan a mhaíomh go bhfuil creidimh phríobháideacha ar eolas.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate with a personality nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
